title: myosotis scorpioides subsp. cespitosa
intro: Myosotis scorpioides subsp. cespitosa, also known as creeping forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. The creeping forget-me-not can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
